description: Style noteadidas classes up sport style with this understated bag that features the signature adidas style. Detest looking geeky? This bag will house your corporate or college essentials while keeping you looking stylish.Product DetailsAn army camouflage patterned bag with two zippered pockets on the frontAn adjustable strap on the front with a Velcro closure (to make the bag expand or contract, depending on the contents)One main compartment with a laptop sleeveTwo mesh pockets on the sidesTwo padded adjustable shoulder strapsMaterial and Care100% PolyesterDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean clothSizeLength: 44 cmWidth: 36 cmDepth: 17 cm
